details.brokersummary:
Beautiful 2-Bedroom, 1-Bath Apartment!
Apartment Features:
Air Conditioning for Year-Round Comfort Sleek Hardwood Flooring Throughout Modern Stainless Steel Appliances Convenient Dishwasher Expansive Living and Dining Area Recently Renovated Bathrooms with Elegant Finishes Abundant Natural Light in Every Room Stylish Track Lighting
Pet-Friendly ? Furry Companions Welcome! Available 3/1 No broker fee

Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2 & 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

Situated just steps from the 2 & 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.

Myspace Exclusive! Beautiful pre-war 2 bedroom in Prime Williamsburg
Located at Roebling and South 3rd --- 4 minutes to the Marcy JMZ
2 big sunny bedrooms real living room with great layout ? fits a sofa, coffee table and TV separate kitchen tons of natural light in all rooms
Includes heat and hot water
Available June 1 Small pets OK

Virtual tour available!
Beautiful two bedroom apartment available in Williamsburg, prime location!
This is the ideal opportunity to live in one of Brooklyn?s hottest neighborhoods. Walk in to a spacious living area with an open kitchen and plenty of dining space. Large bedroom closet. Heat and hot water is included so no need to mind the thermostat. Enjoy a multitude of cafes in your community. Located just a few blocks to Williamsburg Smorgasburg/Flea Market. Cut your commute time to the city with the J, M, Z trains minutes from your door. Bring your furry friends - the building allows pets!

Virtual Tour Available! Beautiful 1.5 BR/1bath apartment in fabulous Bushwick!This apartment is in the pindrop-quiet "rear" building of this unique courtyard complex! It's like your own little treehouse in the middle of Bushwick. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.No brokers fee!Only First & SecurityContact to schedule your appointment today!

Lovely two bedroom apartment located in the heart of Bushwick. The apartment features hardwood floors throughout and a renovated kitchen with stainless steal appliances and butcher block bar/island. The large bedrooms have plenty of natural light to start your morning off right. The building is pet friendly and has laundry facility in the basement so no need to haul those heavy laundry bags. Great location just one block from Maria Hernandez Park, Jefferson L train stop and surrounded by popular taverns and cafes. No fee!

Lovely two bedroom apartment located in the heart of Bushwick. The apartment features hardwood floors throughout and a renovated kitchen with stainless steal appliances and butcher block bar/island. The large bedrooms have plenty of natural light to start your morning off right. The building is pet friendly and has laundry facility in the basement so no need to haul those heavy laundry bags. Great location just one block from Maria Hernandez Park, Jefferson L train stop and surrounded by popular taverns and cafes. No fee!

Renovated 2 bed / 1 bath in Bushwick with a clean split layout. Bedrooms on opposite ends, both bright with good closet space. Large open living area, updated kitchen with stainless steel appliances + dishwasher, and a deep soaking tub. Hardwood floors and high ceilings throughout.
Near the L at DeKalb and M at Knickerbocker. Pets considered.

No Fee! Stunning 3 Bedroom in Prime Location
Just off the L/M trains at Myrtle-Wyckoff, this spacious 3-bedroom has everything you need ? and then some.
Enjoy stainless steel appliances, a dishwasher, wood floors, closets and windows in every room, plus central A/C. The building features top-tier amenities including a gym, laundry room, lounge, roof deck, courtyard, and bike storage.
Text or email today to schedule a tour

Spacious 2BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Spacious 4BR/2BA duplex at 140 4th Ave, Unit 5L in Gowanus. This unique layout features two bedrooms on the main level and two upstairs, connected by a spiral staircase. Located on the 5th-floor walk-up, the apartment offers impressive natural light and skyline views stretching toward Manhattan.
Recently updated with high ceilings, a sleek modern kitchen with dishwasher, and stylish bathrooms. The unit also includes central A/C, a built-in Bluetooth sound system, and generous closet/storage space throughout. Each bedroom is well-sized and comfortably fits a queen bed, dresser, and desk.
Set in a prime location near Prospect Park, with easy access to major subway lines. Surrounded by some of Brooklyn?s best dining, bars, and caf?s, plus laundry just a couple blocks away.
Nearby trains: 2, 3, 4, 5, B, Q, D, N, R at Atlantic Ave?Barclays Center and Bergen St.

Flexible Layout ? 2 Bed / 2 Bath in the Heart of Downtown Brooklyn
Spacious and versatile, this unique apartment offers two large bedrooms and two full bathrooms with a central hallway kitchen?ideal for roommates, a couple, or anyone needing extra space. Use it as a massive 1-bedroom with home office, two separate studios with private entrances, or a true 2-bedroom (note: no shared living room).
Enjoy north and south exposures, two entrances, and unbeatable convenience?just minutes from Trader Joe?s, Macy?s, and major subway lines.
Flexible layout. Prime location. Endless possibilities.

Spacious duplex featuring a modern kitchen with breakfast bar and oversized windows that bring in great natural light. The main level offers a large living area with two well-sized bedrooms, while the lower level is a wide open space perfect for a third bedroom, home office, second living area, or a mix of all three.
The building includes a roof deck, laundry, and more. Apartment highlights include central A/C, high ceilings, hardwood floors, video intercom, elevator access, and plenty of light throughout. Kitchen comes equipped with stainless steel appliances, dishwasher, and stone countertops.
Reach out to schedule a showing

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

107 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

96 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

96 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

103 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

103 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

105 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space and roof access.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

105 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space and roof access.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

105 Moore Street is a boutique rental in East Williamsburg offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Units feature hardwood floors, central air, and dishwashers. Select apartments include private outdoor space and roof access.
The building also offers laundry in the basement and a shared rooftop.
Great location:
Easy access to the L, JM, and G trains Close to Trader Joe?s and Whole Foods Surrounded by restaurants, bars, and cafes

Spacious 2BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Spacious Studo!
Bright and modern Studio- walk to Myrtle-Wyckoff (L/M). Surrounded by parks, shops, and dining options.
The unit features windows throughout for great natural light, in-unit laundry, and access to building amenities including a rooftop, gym, bike storage, and more.

June 1st Move-In Spacious 2-Bedroom Duplex with Shared Backyard ? Right by Dumbo & Vinegar Hill
Freshly updated duplex in the Downtown Brooklyn area. The apartment offers two bedrooms upstairs with a sleek, modern bathroom, while the lower level features a large open living space?perfect for relaxing or entertaining.
You?ll also enjoy access to a shared backyard (only one other unit), giving you a rare bit of outdoor space in the city.
Set just minutes from Dumbo and Vinegar Hill, the location puts you close to multiple subway lines, great restaurants, and everyday essentials. Wegmans, Whole Foods, and Trader Joe?s are all nearby, making errands easy.
A clean, comfortable layout in a super convenient neighborhood?definitely worth checking out.

Spacious 1BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Modern 1 Bed / 1 Bath at 584 4th Ave- Gowanus
Welcome to 584 4th Ave, a brand-new luxury development in the heart of Gowanus. This spacious 1-bedroom features floor-to-ceiling windows with sweeping views of Manhattan, the Statue of Liberty, and city bridges.
Enjoy premium amenities including:
Elevator
Rooftop with panoramic views
Fitness center
In-unit washer/dryer
Located near Park Slope with easy access to the F, G, D, N, and R trains, this building offers the perfect mix of style, comfort, and convenience.
Pets allowed upon approval.
Schedule a tour today!

2 Bed / 1 Bath ? 20 Wilson Ave #2R, Bushwick All pets welcome. Steps from the Morgan Av (L), Central Av (M), and Myrtle Av (J, M) trains.
This bright and spacious 2-bedroom is right in the heart of Bushwick, close to everything Morgan Avenue has to offer. The layout features a large open living space and a sleek kitchen with stainless steel appliances. You'll find high ceilings, recessed lighting, hardwood floors throughout, and two roomy bedrooms with great natural light. A great spot with style, space, and convenience.
